events.text: File created successfully at: /app/answer.json (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment complete: the missing bonding jumper around the water meter is a **fail** — NEC 250.104(A) requires metal water piping to be bonded, and since a water meter can be removed/serviced, it doesn't reliably maintain continuity, so a jumper must bypass it. This is a shock/fault-path hazard, rated **high risk**, with corrective action (install jumper per Table 250.66, verify continuity) written to `/app/answer.json`.
